name: API Tests

on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  postman-tests:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Instalar Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 22

      - name: Instalar Newman
        run: |
          npm install -g newman
          npm install -g newman-reporter-htmlextra

      - name: Executar Leads
        run: |
          newman run API_Hunter_postman_collection.json \
          -e HOMOL_postman_environment.json \
          -d dados_csv.csv \
          --folder Leads

      - name: Executar Leads Lists
        run: |
          newman run API_Hunter_postman_collection.json \
          -e HOMOL_postman_environment.json \
          -d dados_lead_list_csv.csv \
          --folder Leads_Lists
